relevance_spans.text: A learning organization encourages personal mastery and cultivates open feedback to see problems and opportunities on all levels.
They design and implement feedback loops.

A learning organization prospers when all members share a common vision That way employees can understand the importance of their role connect the dots and develop systems thinking When goals are clear

title: The Learning Organization
